title: Inspiring Fps
description: Ever felt like playing Minecraft, but then remembered that you have a crummy laptop from 2007? this mod pack helps alleviate the problem of low fps, this was my personal modpack for my inspiron 2330.
body:
Unlock Unparalleled Performance: Introducing Inspiring FPS
Are you tired of lag, stuttering, and frustrating gameplay? Do you want to 
experience the full potential of your Minecraft game at high frame rates?

look no further than Inspiring FPS, my expertly created performance 
modpack designed to squeeze every last drop of FPS from your machine. With 
a carefully selected collection of 14 performance mods, we've 
optimized everything from chunk loading to reduced RAM usage
ensure silky-smooth gameplay.

By installing Inspiring FPS, you can expect:

* Significant performance improvements: experience up to 300 FPS+ on a GTX 1070 + i7-6700
* Reduced lag and stuttering: say goodbye to frustrating pauses in your 
gameplay, with ferrite core running out of ram has become a thing of the past!

These 14 mods have been meticulously chosen to work together in harmony, 
ensuring a seamless and enjoyable Minecraft experience. Enjoy 
lightning-fast Minecraft performance. Download Inspiring FPS today and 
discover a whole new world of possibility!


All the mods in this pack can be found on modrinth.
